scripts.test: python3 tools/verify.py && node tests/operator-parity.test.mjs && node tests/sovereign-machine-economy.test.mjs
scripts.test:strict: npm test && npm run assurance && npm run factual && npm run build
scripts.test:final: npm test && npm run assurance && npm run assurance:final && npm run factual:mainnet && npm run build && npm run assurance:final
